'''Koba''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] on the [[Cerean Reach/Legends|Cerean Reach]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="TEA" /> It was ravaged by [[Tulak]] the [[Advozse/Legends|Advozse]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]], but later protected from his son [[Kalut]] by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Yaddle/Legends|Yaddle]].

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Koba's history is discussed in "[[Yaddle's Tale: The One Below]]," a ''[[Star Wars Tales]]'' story with an unclear level of [[canon]]icity. While the main story has been referenced in other stories, the framing story has continuity errors.

Koba is called "Koda" in [[Jedi Quest: The Shadow Trap|''The Shadow Trap'']] and the natives "[[Koban|Kodans]]."
